description: Use this API to retrieve the number of files in a specified group in the Scenario. This API routine was first introduced in release 33.0.0. ierr, nfiles = scenariofilecount(sgroup)

parameters.name: sgroup
parameters.description: Group to retrieve the file count of input. (input; ignored by default).

return_values.name: nfiles
return_values.description: Number of the files in the specified group. (output).
